summary: Comprehensive testing of Email/Password Authentication feature for Archer Legal App. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Email/password login and registration work correctly. Google OAuth regression test passed. Apple and Facebook buttons correctly show MOCKED error messages.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/register - Register with valid email/password/name/plan returns user + session_token
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - Duplicate email returns 409
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - Short password (<8 chars) returns 400
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - Pro plan registration works
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Correct credentials return user + session_token
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Wrong password returns 401
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Non-existent email returns 401
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Case-insensitive email works
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - Valid Bearer token returns user data (no password_hash)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - No token returns 401
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - Invalid token returns 401
Backend: POST /api/auth/logout - Clears session (subsequent /auth/me returns 401)
Backend: POST /api/auth/session - Endpoint exists (Google OAuth regression)
Backend: Password hash uses bcrypt format ($2b$ prefix)
Backend: Test data cleanup successful
Frontend: Login page shows email/password form
Frontend: Login page shows Google/Apple/Facebook buttons
Frontend: Login page shows error for wrong credentials
Frontend: Apple button shows MOCKED error message
Frontend: Facebook button shows MOCKED error message
Frontend: Signup page shows name/email/password form + plan selection
Frontend: Signup page shows Google/Apple/Facebook buttons
Frontend: Short password validation works on signup
Frontend: Registration redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Login redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Google button redirects to auth.emergentagent.com
Frontend: User name visible in dashboard sidebar after login

test_credentials.note: Test users created and cleaned up during testing

seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing were cleaned up after tests completed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email/Password authentication is fully implemented and working. Backend endpoints: /api/auth/register, /api/auth/login, /api/auth/me, /api/auth/logout all pass tests. Frontend Login.js and Signup.js pages work correctly with email/password forms. Google OAuth continues to work via /api/auth/session endpoint. Apple and Facebook buttons are MOCKED - they show error messages indicating developer credentials are needed. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_email_auth.py can be reused for regression testing.

google_oauth_regression.redirect: Google button redirects to auth.emergentagent.com - WORKING

social_login_mocked.apple: Shows error message - MOCKED (no Apple Developer credentials)
social_login_mocked.facebook: Shows error message - MOCKED (no Facebook App credentials)

frontend_ui.signup_page: Name/email/password form + plan selection + social buttons - WORKING

mocked_apis.apple_sign_in: Shows error: 'Apple Sign In requires Apple Developer credentials. Please configure them in Settings.'
mocked_apis.facebook_login: Shows error: 'Facebook Login requires Facebook App credentials. Please configure them in Settings.'
